headline: Semiconductor Sales Continue to Soar: 4 Stocks With Growth Potential
summary: Semiconductor sales surge in 2026 on booming AI demand. ADI, NXPI, TSM and NVDA emerge as chip stocks with strong earnings growth potential this year.
